creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
We cannot compile japanese/onew-* on 3.0-CURRENT,
because /usr/include/regex.h is different from one of 2.X-RELEASE.

Fix: First, you make a new direcotory, /usr/ports/japanese/onew-wnn4/patches.
Next, please add the next patch as patch-aa into the directory.
